visual_summary: The image depicts an indoor public market with stalls selling fresh produce like apples and other fruits. People are casually walking, shopping, and interacting in a spacious, well-lit area beneath a high ceiling with industrial-style beams and ceiling fans. A large sign reading 'Marché Jean-Talon' is prominently displayed above the entrance to the market aisle.

cinematic_notes: wide shots to capture market bustle and scale
close-ups on colorful fruits and hands picking items
natural lighting enhanced by overhead fixtures
depth shots down the market aisles for dynamic perspective

visual_summary: The image shows a narrow urban street or alleyway bordered by older brick buildings on the left and a mix of brick and stone buildings on the right. A metal construction fence runs along the left side, indicating ongoing road or building work; in the distance, a couple of people walk down the sidewalk. Prominent signage for a restaurant called 'Chicken Plus' with English, Korean, and French text is visible on the right side.
location: Urban street with construction, featuring mixed architecture and small businesses

metal construction fence and red barriers
old brick buildings with windows and fire escapes

someone entering or exiting the Chicken Plus restaurant
delivery or service activity near the businesses
cinematic_notes: use shallow depth of field to highlight signage or pedestrians against the blurred construction fence
capture atmospheric light from overcast sky for soft, diffused lighting
track focus moving down the alley to reveal the couple walking or details of the construction
leverage vertical lines of fire escapes and building edges for dramatic framing

visual_summary: A blue and white STM metro train is stationary at an underground platform. The platform has a distinctive yellow textured safety strip along its edge.

visual_summary: The image shows two backlit fashion posters side by side in an indoor station area next to a stairway. The left poster features a male model in light-colored casual attire under the title 'TRISTAN' and the right poster shows a female model dressed in modern style with the text 'LE POUVOIR DU STYLE.' The setting includes tiled flooring with a geometric pattern, beige stone walls, and a set of stairs with a metal handrail.

lighting changes due to time of day or station usage
